name: Farmhouse Bar-b-Que Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the biscuits into 10 portions and flatten each into a 5-inch circle.
2. Press each biscuit into the bottom and sides of a greased muffin cup; set aside.
3. Brown the beef in a frying pan and drain well.
4. In a small bowl, mix together the ketchup, brown sugar, cider vinegar, and chili powder until combined.
5. Add the meat to the sauce and mix thoroughly.
6. Divide the meat mixture among the muffin cups, using about 1/4 cup for each.
7. Sprinkle shredded cheese on top of each muffin.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 18-20 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Cool for 5 minutes before removing from the muffin tin.
